name: Appointments: Create Request

description.en: Create an appointment request when an appointment cannot be booked natively.
description.de: Erstellt eine Terminanfrage, wenn ein Termin nicht direkt gebucht werden kann.

bot: Use this when booking cannot be completed because there is no connected calendar, no suitable slots were found, or the user wants manual follow-up. Create a clear appointment request with the requester, preferred start time, duration, timezone, failure reason, and notes.

inputs.name: Title
inputs.bot: Use a title like 'Appointment request: Intro Call'.

inputs.name: Service Slug

description.de: Optionaler Bezeichner fuer einen konfigurierten Service

inputs.bot: If the request belongs to a configured service, pass the service slug.

inputs.name: Requester Name
inputs.bot: Name of the requester if known.

inputs.name: Requester Email
inputs.bot: Email address of the requester if known.

inputs.name: Window Start

description.en: Preferred scheduling window start in ISO format
description.de: Beginn des bevorzugten Zeitfensters im ISO-Format

inputs.bot: Earliest preferred time in ISO 8601 format.

inputs.name: Timezone
inputs.bot: Timezone identifier such as Europe/Vienna or America/New_York.

inputs.name: Failure Reason

description.en: Why direct booking could not complete
description.de: Warum die direkte Buchung nicht abgeschlossen werden konnte

inputs.bot: Use a compact machine-readable reason like no_calendar_integration, no_suitable_slots, or stale_slot.

inputs.name: Notes
inputs.bot: Optional notes or context for manual follow-up.

description.en: We'll get back to you at these details.
description.de: Wir melden uns unter diesen Angaben bei dir.

description.en: Give us a rough idea of your availability.
description.de: Gib uns eine ungefähre Vorstellung deiner Verfügbarkeit.

description.en: A few words help us prepare for the meeting.
description.de: Ein paar Worte helfen uns, das Treffen vorzubereiten.
